scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run build --prefix functions && npx firebase emulators:start --only auth,firestore,functions"
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix functions && npm run test --prefix functions
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build --prefix functions && npx firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions "npm run test:e2e --prefix frontend"
